'''modhangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:fabian|fabian]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-dh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fabian|fabian]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| modhangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:modhangithi|modhangithi]] || [[word:modhangiji|modhangiji]] || [[word:modhangishi|modhangishi]] || [[word:modhangiki|modhangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:modhanguthuthu|modhanguthuthu]] || [[word:modhangujuju|modhangujuju]] || [[word:modhangushushu|modhangushushu]] || [[word:modhangukuku|modhangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:modhanguthu|modhanguthu]] || [[word:modhanguju|modhanguju]] || [[word:modhangushu|modhangushu]] || [[word:modhanguku|modhanguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:modhangufthuf|modhangufthuf]] || [[word:modhangufjuf|modhangufjuf]] || [[word:modhangufshuf|modhangufshuf]] || [[word:modhangufkuf|modhangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:modhangethe|modhangethe]] || [[word:modhangeje|modhangeje]] || [[word:modhangeshe|modhangeshe]] || [[word:modhangeke|modhangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:modhangothotho|modhangothotho]] || [[word:modhangojojo|modhangojojo]] || [[word:modhangoshosho|modhangoshosho]] || [[word:modhangokoko|modhangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:modhangotho|modhangotho]] || [[word:modhangojo|modhangojo]] || [[word:modhangosho|modhangosho]] || [[word:modhangoko|modhangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:modhangofthof|modhangofthof]] || [[word:modhangofjof|modhangofjof]] || [[word:modhangofshof|modhangofshof]] || [[word:modhangofkof|modhangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:modhangĂŻfthĂŻf|modhangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:modhangĂŻfjĂŻf|modhangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:modhangĂŻfshĂŻf|modhangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:modhangĂŻfkĂŻf|modhangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:modhangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|modhangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:modhangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|modhangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:modhangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|modhangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:modhangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|modhangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:modhangĂŻfthĂŻf|modhangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:modhangĂŻfjĂŻf|modhangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:modhangĂŻfshĂŻf|modhangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:modhangĂŻfkĂŻf|modhangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:modhangĂŻfthĂŻf|modhangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:modhangĂŻfjĂŻf|modhangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:modhangĂŻfshĂŻf|modhangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:modhangĂŻfkĂŻf|modhangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:modhangĂŠthĂŠ|modhangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:modhangĂŠjĂŠ|modhangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:modhangĂŠshĂŠ|modhangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:modhangĂŠkĂŠ|modhangĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:modhangathatha|modhangathatha]] || [[word:modhangajaja|modhangajaja]] || [[word:modhangashasha|modhangashasha]] || [[word:modhangakaka|modhangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:modhangatha|modhangatha]] || [[word:modhangaja|modhangaja]] || [[word:modhangasha|modhangasha]] || [[word:modhangaka|modhangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:modhangafthaf|modhangafthaf]] || [[word:modhangafjaf|modhangafjaf]] || [[word:modhangafshaf|modhangafshaf]] || [[word:modhangafkaf|modhangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:modhangasha|modhangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:modhangshĂ«sha|modhangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:modhangrosha|modhangrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:modhangmusha|modhangmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:modhangyasha|modhangyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomodhangnkshĂ«sha|gomodhangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomodhangnkrosha|gomodhangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomodhangnkmusha|gomodhangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomodhangnkyasha|gomodhangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:modhadhangasha|modhadhangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:modhadhangshĂ«sha|modhadhangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:modhadhangrosha|modhadhangrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:modhadhangmusha|modhadhangmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:modhadhangyasha|modhadhangyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomodhadhangnkshĂ«sha|gomodhadhangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomodhadhangnkrosha|gomodhadhangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomodhadhangnkmusha|gomodhadhangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomodhadhangnkyasha|gomodhadhangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:medhĂŠngasha|medhĂŠngasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:medhĂŠngshĂ«sha|medhĂŠngshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:medhĂŠngrosha|medhĂŠngrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:medhĂŠngmusha|medhĂŠngmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:medhĂŠngyasha|medhĂŠngyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomedhĂŠngnkshĂ«sha|gomedhĂŠngnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomedhĂŠngnkrosha|gomedhĂŠngnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomedhĂŠngnkmusha|gomedhĂŠngnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomedhĂŠngnkyasha|gomedhĂŠngnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:modhfangasha|modhfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:modhfangshĂ«sha|modhfangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:modhfangrosha|modhfangrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:modhfangmusha|modhfangmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:modhfangyasha|modhfangyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomodhfangnkshĂ«sha|gomodhfangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomodhfangnkrosha|gomodhfangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomodhfangnkmusha|gomodhfangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomodhfangnkyasha|gomodhfangnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
